hero.title: Learn&Share
hero.subtitle: P2P Learning Reimagined
hero.description: A decentralized knowledge-sharing platform where everyone can teach and learn directly from others - through one-on-one sessions, group classes, and large-scale events.

1.title: Sign Up
1.description: Create an account, complete your profile, and specify your interests and skills

2.title: Choose Your Role
2.description: Decide who you want to be today: a student or a teacher

3.title: Start Learning
3.description: Find the perfect teacher or students for knowledge exchange

oneOnOne.title: One-on-One Sessions
oneOnOne.description: Book personal sessions with mentors and experts in various fields

groupClasses.title: Group Classes
groupClasses.description: Organize or join affordable and collaborative learning sessions

events.title: Events & Webinars
events.description: Participate in public lectures, webinars, and workshops from the community

reviews.title: Reviews & Ratings
reviews.description: Build trust and transparency through verified user reviews

chat.title: Chat System
chat.description: Convenient communication with teachers and students before and after sessions for maximum efficiency

payments.title: Flexible Payments
payments.description: Convenient payment system and wallet for easy earnings and expense management

1.quote: The platform completely changed my approach to learning. Now I can not only gain knowledge but also share my experience with others. A wonderful opportunity for professional growth!
1.name: Alexander K.

2.quote: Thanks to Learn&Share, I found the perfect design teacher. The user-friendly interface, flexible schedule, and personalized approach made learning extremely effective.
2.name: Maria S.

3.quote: As an English teacher, I appreciate the opportunity to work with motivated students. The platform provides all the necessary tools for effective teaching.
3.name: Elena M.

cta.title: Join the Community Today
cta.description: We're democratizing access to education by making it flexible, accessible, and community-based
